calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Anne Massullo, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Puneet Singh, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff 57 Taylor 17, LP.
Witness Seon Reisland sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Dynah B. Tacandong.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 57 Taylor St, Apt #232, San Francisco, California 94102, San Francisco.

Damages $1788.62
Holdover damages $1070.12
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $2858.74

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Garrett Wong; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 57 Taylor Street 17, LP is present. Represented by Sean Rieslnad.
Attorney Punett Singh for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dynah Tacandong is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of OCT-01-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
